_notes: Prices are in USD (fetched via Shopify products.json from a US IP; geo-based pricing).
housingMount / portSystem fields are string references to HousingMount.name.
cameraName / cameraBrand are string hints; exact DB IDs must be resolved during seeding.

housingMounts.name: Fixed Flat Port with Bayonet Mount
N85 for Olympus and Panasonic Micro Four Thirds

housings.name: Insta360 X5 Housing
housings.description: The Insta360 X5 refines the 360-degree formula, addressing creators’ concerns. It features a robust, IP68-certified body with enhanced waterproofing, providing a rugged feel. The dual 1/1.28” sensors and new triple-AI chip pipeline significantly improve low-light performance. PureVideo mode offers cleaner footage with better noise reduction and highlight protection compared to the X4 in dark conditions. The 8K/30fps 360 capture remains reliable, delivering richer colors and cleaner footage in high-contrast daylight. The user-replaceable lens design, combined with the advanced optics in the Nauticam housing, ensures superior results. The “shoot first, frame later” workflow is powerful, supported by a new InstaFrame mode that captures 360 and a 1080p flat, auto-tracked video for instant sharing. The Invisible Selfie Stick and FlowState stabilization make third-person follow shots look like drone footage. With a battery life boost to 2400mAh, the X5 offers over 3 hours of shooting in 5.7K

housings.name: NA-A7V Housing for Sony α7 V Camera
housings.description: The Sony a7 V is an impressive hybrid mirrorless camera that offers exceptional photographic performance and remarkable video recording capabilities. It also incorporates the latest AI-driven subject recognition and autofocus technology, inherited from its flagship counterparts.

housings.name: NA-R6III Housing for Canon EOS R6III Camera
housings.description: The Canon R6 Mark III is a powerful hybrid camera that seamlessly integrates impressive photo speeds (up to 40fps burst), Pre-Continuous Shooting, and robust video capabilities such as 7K RAW recording. It also features dual card slots and a full-size HDMI output. These features are housed in a familiar, weather-sealed body that retains the top-tier autofocus inherited from Cinema EOS. When combined with the Nauticam NA-R6III housing, this camera becomes an exceptional tool for underwater image creators.

housings.name: NA-C50 Housing for Canon C50 Camera
housings.description: The Canon C50 is a compact, powerful cinema camera that blends cinematic image quality with a portable form factor, making it a versatile tool for underwater creators looking for a smaller system. It delivers impressive 7K RAW footage, professional audio, and over 15+ stops of dynamic range.

housings.name: NA-ZR Housing for Nikon ZR Camera
housings.description: The Nikon ZR is a compact full-frame cinema camera that was developed in collaboration with RED Digital Cinema. It’s perfect for both video professionals and enthusiasts who want to take their video game to the next level. With features like 32-bit float audio, super-fast autofocus, and the ability to capture up to 6K60 video in REDCODE, N-RAW, or ProRes RAW formats, the Nikon ZR is sure to impress.

housings.name: NA-OM5II Housing for OM SYSTEM OM-5II Camera
housings.description: The OM‑5 Mark II refines a proven formula: a compact, durable, and feature-rich mirrorless camera that is both lightweight and travel-friendly. With the addition of USB-C connectivity, an enhanced menu system, and several innovative video enhancements, the OM‑5 Mark II stands as an exceptional choice for hybrid photographers and videographers.

housings.name: NA-Z5II Housing for Nikon Z5II Camera
housings.description: Nikon has significantly upgraded the capabilities of the Z5II with improved processing speed, subject recognition autofocus, and enhanced low-light performance. Equipped with a 24.5-megapixel sensor, dual SD card slots, and comprehensive video recording features, the Nikon Z5II empowers users to elevate their underwater creativity. When combined with the NA-Z5II underwater housing, it offers a comprehensive solution for capturing exceptional underwater content. The ergonomic housing design optimizes the placement of essential controls, positioning them on the left and right handles for intuitive and efficient on-the-fly adjustments

housings.name: NA-CV1 for Canon PowerShot V1 Digital Camera
housings.description: The Canon PowerShot V1 is the latest compact camera from Canon which features an impressive 1.4" CMOS sensor, Dual Pixel CMOS II autofocus system and an ultra wide built in 16-50mm power zoom lens which pairs well with the Nauticam Water Contact Optics.

housings.name: 7'' T7  HD UltraBright Monitor  (HDMI 1.4 input, excl. cables)
housings.description: Introducing the Nauticam 7" T7 HD UltraBright Monitor. Crafted for professional videographers and photographers, this advanced monitor delivers an incredibly bright 3000 nit display, ensuring optimal visibility even in challenging lighting conditions. With up to 6 hours of battery life, you can count on it for extended shoots, providing consistent, reliable performance throughout your dive. Equipped with essential tools such as Focus Peaking, False Color, Histogram and many more, the Nauticam 7" T7 HD UltraBright Monitor offers you the ultimate monitoring tool for any project.

housings.name: 7'' G7 HD UltraBright Monitor (HDMI 1.4 and 2K SDI input, excl. cables)
housings.description: Introducing the Nauticam 7" G7 HD UltraBright Monitor. Crafted for professional videographers and photographers, this advanced monitor delivers an incredibly bright 3000 nit display, ensuring optimal visibility even in challenging lighting conditions. With up to 6 hours of battery life, you can count on it for extended shoots, providing consistent, reliable performance throughout your dive. Equipped with essential tools such as Focus Peaking, False Color, Histogram and many more, the Nauticam 7" G7 HD UltraBright Monitor offers you the ultimate monitoring tool for any project.

housings.name: NA-α1II Housing for Sony a1II and a9III Camera
housings.description: Introducing the NA-α1II Housing for both the Sony α1II and Sony α9III mirrorless cameras. Sony's a1II and a9III cameras cover every shooter's needs whether it's high-resolution or low-light photography or 8K video. With both cameras sharing a common body design, Nauticam is able to offer one housing that accommodates both models allowing for a complete underwater imaging toolbox on every trip.

housings.name: NA-S1RII Housing for Panasonic Lumix S1R II / S1II / S1IIE Camera
housings.description: The Panasonic Lumix DC-S1R II makes some radical changes from its predecessor both in terms of features and size to place it more firmly in the true-hybrid still/video camera space. With a native 8.1K 44MP sensor, the S1RII can capture both high resolution stills as well as 30p 8K video all with a smaller body size and a more hybrid-friendly control arrangement.

housings.name: NA-Z50II Housing for Nikon Z 50 II Camera
housings.description: The Z50 II is Nikon’s follow up to its inaugural DX (ASP-C) sensor mirrorless camera that shares the new Z Lens Mount with their full-frame Z cameras. The Z50 II features several notable improvements over its predecessor especially in the video-capture and auto-focus categories. The Nauticam NA-Z50II is designed to be used exclusively with the Nikon NIKKOR Z DX 16-50mm f/3.5-6.3 VR lens.

housings.name: NA-Shinobi II Housing for Atomos Shinobi II 5.2" Monitor with HDMI 1.4 input
housings.description: The NA-Shinobi II Housing is designed around the Atomos Shinobi II, a powerful yet compact 5" 10-bit HDR monitor with a full suite of advanced tools and 1500-nit peak brightness. Intended for both photo and video shooters, the Shinobi II connects via our HDMI cable system to supported housings to allow for enhanced ease of viewing.
housings.cameraName: Shinobi II 5.2" Monitor with HDMI 1.4 input

housings.name: NA-C400 Housing for Canon C400 Camera
housings.description: The Canon C400 is the next evolution in Canon's C-series Cinema Line. Built around a full-frame 6K BSI sensor and RF-mount, the C400 also features mechanical ND filters, Dual Pixel AF II and 16 stops of dynamic range. Canon's C-Series cinema cameras feature legendary underwater color, intuitive and accessible menus and excellent control customizability making it ideal for single shooter or situations or larger productions where flexibility and dependability are key.

housings.name: NA-Z6III Housing for Nikon Z6III Camera
housings.description: The Nikon Z6III is a groundbreaking release for Nikon. They’ve taken everything they’ve learned from their Z series cameras and condensed it into a small but powerful package. One of the most impressive features is the ability to record 6K 60p N-RAW and 6K 30p ProRes RAW internally, with no need for an external recorder! Nikon has also incorporated the excellent autofocus performance from the Z8/Z9 into the Z6III, marking a significant improvement over the AF performance of the Z6II/Z7II.

housings.name: NA-R1 Housing for Canon EOS R1 Camera
housings.description: The Canon EOS R1 marks a groundbreaking evolution by delivering the professional-grade features of the DSLR 1DX series to Canon's mirrorless RF-mount lineup. Built with professionals in mind, the R1 excels in autofocus speed and precision, maintaining exceptional image quality even in fast-paced action or challenging low-light conditions. Boasting Canon's brightest and highest-resolution electronic viewfinder (EVF) to date, along with revolutionary autofocus enhancements, the EOS R1 stands as a testament to innovation and is undoubtedly worth the anticipation.

housings.name: NA-R5II Housing for Canon EOS R5II Camera
housings.description: The Canon EOS R5II is the next iteration of the widely popular Canon EOS R5 and retains many of the features that were attractive to underwater image makers. Firstly, and most excitingly video shooters now have access to 8K 60 Raw/4K 60 SRAW/4K 120 10-bit Video. The Canon EOS R5II retains its 45MP full-frame mirrorless sensor that utilizes Canon's new RF lens mount and also has next-generation Dual Pixel autofocus.

housings.name: NA-TG7 Housing for Olympus Tough TG 6 / 7 Camera (M52)
housings.description: NA-TG7 Housing for Olympus Tough TG 6 / 7 Camera (M52)

housings.name: NA-TG7 Housing for Olympus Tough TG 6 / 7 Camera (BM)
housings.description: The Olympus Tough TG-7 is the latest in their line of IP6X rated go-anywhere compact cameras. The TG-6, which also works inside the NA-TG7 housing, was a huge hit amongst underwater photographers as it was able to capture even super-macro images without any need for diopters. The TG-7 is a clear example of Olympus' drive to create a camera that rises to meet the ever-evolving needs of the traveling compact camera user.

housings.name: NA-GFX100II Housing for Fujifilm GFX100II Camera
housings.description: The GFX100 II introduces a revolutionary 102-megapixel large-format sensor. With the GFX100 II, you will experience precise subject detection, superior tracking AF and unparalleled video capabilities never seen in any previous GFX system or X Series camera. Enhanced by upgraded AI-developed autofocus algorithms and a cutting-edge 9.44-million dot EVF, photographers gain unparalleled accuracy. Filmmakers will benefit from 4K/60p and 8K/30p 4:2:2 10-bit in camera recording.

housings.name: NA-A7CII Housing for Sony A7CII / R Camera
housings.description: Sony's newest additions to its ultra-compact full-frame lineup are the Sony A7CII and the Sony A7CR, which pack a punch. Let's dive in and take a look at the specs of each of these cameras.

housings.name: Conversion Kit to Convert 16120 for use with Komodo-X
housings.description: Conversion Kit to Convert 16120 for use with Komodo-X This item is non-returnable, non-refundable, non-cancellable, and may be subject to extended lead times as it is manufactured on demand. We always do our best to meet trip deadlines so please advise us if you have a trip coming up!

housings.name: Conversion Kit to Convert 16116/8/9 for use with Komodo-X
housings.description: Conversion Kit to Convert 16116/8/9 for use with Komodo-X

housings.name: RED® KOMODO-X™ Housing for RED® KOMODO-X™
housings.description: The RED® KOMODO-X™ camera features a 6K Super 35 sensor with up to 16 stops of dynamic range. R3D files (REDCODE RAW) can be recorded directly to CFast 2.0 cards, eliminating the need for expensive proprietary media. It also features Canon's new RF mount with full support of the Canon EF to EOS R lens adaptor allowing a wide variety of focal lengths to be used. The RED® KOMODO-X™ is second in size only to the RED KOMODO allowing it to have one of the smallest form factors of the RED Digital Cinema Lineup. The feature set is clearly aimed at those requiring professional-level specs in a travel-friendly package, which accurately describes the majority of underwater filmmakers. The RED® KOMODO-X™ includes the next generation of imaging sensors with completely overhauled sensor architecture, updated pixel design, and improvements in both details and color in shadows.

housings.name: NA-A6700 Housing for Sony A6700 Camera
housings.description: The mirrorless APS-C segment is seeing several new additions including this follow-up from Sony to its popular A6000 series the A6700. The A6700 borrows much of its technology from both its cinema, vlogging, and full-frame alpha siblings. Sony has mated the 26MP BSI CMOS sensor to its 'Bionz-X' processor to deliver top-tier autofocus and impressive video specs. Nauticam's aluminum housings for the A6000 series offer unparalleled control with an intuitive interface and the NA-A6700 builds on this legacy to produce the finest underwater imaging platform for the Sony A6700.

housings.name: NA-R50 Housing Pro Package for Canon EOS R50
housings.description: Underwater imaging enthusiasts seek improved performance without sacrificing the compactness and simplicity of their camera systems. World travelers desire a smaller alternative to DSLRs without compromising performance. Addressing these needs, Nauticam introduces the NA-R50 housing, designed to house Canon's EOS R50 mirrorless APS-C camera. The goal was to create a compact and user-friendly housing that delivers exceptional imaging results. Nauticam successfully achieves this by combining their renowned ergonomics and quality in a new housing category.

housings.name: NA-Z8 Housing for Nikon Z8 Camera
housings.description: The Z8 is arguably the most hotly anticipated full-frame mirrorless camera from Nikon and the first to feature the '8' series badging. Featuring a high-resolution 45.7MP sensor that will also capture 8K/60p N-RAW video while delivering incredible autofocus and dynamic range. The Z8's 3690k-dot OLED EVF packs a fast refresh rate for blackout free shooting thanks to the camera's electronic shutter. The Nauticam NA-Z8 is the latest release in the world's finest line of underwater camera housings and builds on the field-proven housings for other Nikon 'Z-series' cameras . Nauticam is the market leader in ergonomics, build quality, and reliability that are built on a foundation of innovative product design and modern manufacturing technology. The NA-Z8 is the ultimate accessory for the powerful Nikon Z8.

housings.name: NA-Ultra5 Housing for SmallHD Ultra 5 Camera Monitor
housings.description: The SmallHD Ultra 5 Camera Monitor is their brightest and most feature-rich monitor to date that adds camera controls for a variety of cinema cameras such as ARRI, Sony and RED. The 300nit 5" HD screen is flanked by 3 custom function buttons. The Nauticam NA-Ultra5 is sure to be an indispensable tool for underwater filmmakers.

housings.name: NA-S5II Housing for Panasonic Lumix S5II/X Camera
housings.description: Introducing the Nauticam NA-S5II underwater housing, a robust and ergonomic solution designed to accommodate the Panasonic Lumix S5 II and S5 IIX for underwater photography and videography. This housing provides unfettered access to all camera controls and functions, enabling users to fully utilize the camera's capabilities while diving. Its durable construction and user-friendly features make it an ideal choice for underwater storytellers seeking a dependable and efficient underwater housing option.

housings.name: NA-R50 Housing for Canon EOS R50 with RF-S 18-45mm F4.5-6.3 IS STM Lens
housings.description: Many underwater imaging enthusiasts have been anxious to move beyond the limited performance of their compact camera systems but have been reluctant to give up the compact form factor and simplicity of the genre. Other world travelers have started wondering if there is a way to downsize from their DSLR without giving up too much performance. Nauticam has been listening to this increasing interest and their industry leading engineers have responded with the new NA-R50.
housings.housingMount: Fixed Flat Port with Bayonet Mount
housings.cameraName: EOS R50 with RF-S 18-45mm F4.5-6.3 IS STM Lens

housings.name: NA-R6II Housing for Canon EOS R6 II Camera
housings.description: The Canon EOS R6 Mark II may look like it's predecessor, but it offers a lot of new features attractive to underwater image makers. It has a new 24MP full frame sensor, it is capable of recording UHD 4K/60p without any crop factor internally and also supports ProRes RAW recording up to 6K to an external recorder such as the Ninja V.

housings.name: NA-A7RV Housing for Sony α7R V Camera
housings.description: With each new generation of camera, Sony continues to make giant strides in the way images are taken and processed. The Sony a7R V shares the same 61MP sensor as the previous a7R IV, however it has made huge advancements in processing capacity which brings improvements across the board. With a newly developed AI processing unit, the Sony a7R V brings an all new autofocus system which builds upon more intelligent subject tracking and recognition. The a7R V features 8 stops of image stabilization and an impressive array of video capabilities including 8K 10-Bit internal recording and 16-Bit RAW external recording over HDMI which are sure to make this a popular choice among underwater shooters.

housings.name: ARRI ALEXA 35 Camera Housing ~Excludes port and extension
housings.description: The ARRI ALEXA 35 sets a new standard for Super 35 digital video cameras and features an all new 4.6K ALEV 4 CMOS sensor. It offers a massive 17 stops of dynamic range and a host of new features making this the new gold standard for digital cinematography.

housings.name: Digital Cinema System for ARRI ALEXA 35 Camera ~Includes 100mm housing extension and N200 250mm optical glass wide angle port
housings.description: The ARRI ALEXA 35 sets a new standard for Super 35 digital video cameras and features an all new 4.6K ALEV 4 CMOS sensor. It offers a massive 17 stops of dynamic range and a host of new features making this the new gold standard for digital cinematography.

housings.name: NA-R7 Housing for Canon EOS R7 Camera
housings.description: The latest Canon APS-C mirrorless camera is finally here! The Canon EOS R7 utilizes Canon's newest RF mount and boasts a 32.5MP CMOS sensor. Crop-sensor cameras have always been popular with the underwater shooter community and with good reason. Lens choices, size, and weight are just a few of the great features that shooting APS-C cameras has. The EOS R7 gives original Canon 7D and 7D Mark II shooters a great reason to upgrade and Nauticam is ready to help with the NA-R7 housing.

housings.name: NA-OM1 Housing for OM System OM-1 and OM-1 Mark II Camera
housings.description: This housing is fully compatible with the OM System OM-1 Mark II Camera.

housings.name: NA-R5C Housing for Canon EOS R5 C Camera
housings.description: The Canon EOS R5 C is arguably one of the best hybrid mirrorless cameras released to date. Canon spared no expense to ensure the R5 C would be an exceptional cinema and still photo camera. With swappable menu structures to replicate the EOS Cinema lineup when in video mode or the traditional photo menu when in still photo mode, this camera ensures you are not sacrificing ease of access to what is most important to you. It is a 45MP full frame mirrorless camera that is capable of shooting internal 8K 60p video utilizing Canon's Cinema RAW Light.

housings.name: RED® V-RAPTOR® Housing for RED® V-RAPTOR®
housings.description: The RED® V-RAPTOR® is RED's latest flagship camera that can record REDCODE RAW in 8K resolution up to 120fps. When paired with the Nauticam housing, it creates one of the smallest and easiest to use cinema systems on the market. Additionally, the Nauticam Raptor housing also offers control of the RED® KOMODO™ and RED® KOMODO-X™ through the top and side RCP2 control panels via an optional tray.

housings.name: NA-Z9 Housing for Nikon Z9 Camera
housings.description: The specifications of Nikon's new flagship full-frame mirrorless Z9 read more like a wish list and promise to make it one of the most powerful hybrid imaging platforms available. The Z9 features a 45.7MP FX-format sensor paired with the new EXPEED 7 Processor that promises true no-blackout 20fps RAW, blazing fast 120fps 11MP JPEG, and up to 8K60p (with 2022 update) video capture.

housings.name: NA-GH6 Housing for Panasonic Lumix GH6 and GH7 Camera
housings.description: The Panasonic GH5 brought high-end video specs to the micro four thirds platform, setting the bar for what was possible in this compact form-factor. Since the GH5, the open-source MFT actor has grown, with a massive variety of lenses available and camera specifications that rival or exceed some of their larger siblings. The GH6 follows closely in the GH5's footsteps, adding incredible new video features and even some notable still image enhancements. The GH5, GH5s, and GH5II have been well represented in the underwater imaging space and the arrival of the GH6 is sure to be met with serious enthusiasm given the spec sheet and early reviews.

housings.name: NA-503-S Housing for SmallHD 503 UltraBright On-Camera Monitor (with 3G-SDI input support)
housings.description: The SmallHD 503 UltraBright monitor is an incredibly compact and sharp 5-inch daylight viewable field monitor and the perfect complement to a Nauticam underwater video system. The UltraBright version adds 2200 nit daylight viewable brightness to the already stunning 5″, 1920 x 1080 Full HD Display. The 443 PPI monitor comes equipped with an amazing suite of software tools for image monitoring in a compact form factor. This version of the NA-503-S is setup for an HD-SDI camera connection, see NA-503-H for an HDMI camera connection.

housings.name: FX3 Housing for Sony FX3/FX30 Full-frame Cinema Line Camera
housings.description: Looking at the specs, the Sony FX3 is strikingly similar to the A7S III less an electronic viewfinder. Take a closer look and its the powerful video features of the A7S III with cinema-centric controls and exterior design. The FX3 can capture 4K at up to 120fps with 15+ stops of dynamic range with the option for RAW over HDMI. Controls are optimized for video with direct iris, ISO and shutter angle control. With the addition of an internal fan, the recording time limit for 4K60p has been removed. The NA-FX3's compact size make it ideal for the traveling filmmaker and those looking for a more nimble underwater system.

housings.name: Atomos Ninja V-S Housing for Atomos Ninja V, Ninja V+ and Ninja Ultra 5" Recorder/Monitor/Player (excl. HDMI 2.0 cable) with Atomos AtomX SDI Module
housings.description: * Compatible with the Atomos Ninja V, V+, 5.2, Ultra
housings.cameraName: Ninja V, Ninja V+ and Ninja Ultra 5" Recorder/Monitor/Player (excl. HDMI 2.0 cable) with Atomos AtomX SDI Module

housings.name: NA-α1 Housing for Sony α1 Camera
housings.description: Aimed squarely at professional image makers, the Sony Alpha 1 provides a 50MP sensor capable of 30fps burst shooting and 8K video. It features Sony's latest autofocus system, an incredible 9.44M-dot EVF and a 1/400 sec flash sync speed with the mechanical shutter. Whether you are interested in still photos or video, this camera can do just about anything you need it to.

housings.name: NA-A7C Housing for Sony A7C Camera
housings.description: Sony's latest full frame mirrorless camera, the a7C offers the underwater image maker one of the most compact and travel friendly full frame systems available on the market today. The a7C features Sony's latest stellar autofocus and a much improved battery life thanks to its use of the larger Z series battery. The BIONZ X processor delivers superb low-light performance and faster image processing. For video shooters, the a7C features internal UHD 4K capture in the wide-dynamic range HLG image profile at up to 30p.

housings.name: NA-R5 Housing for Canon EOS R5 Camera
housings.description: The Canon EOS R5 is attractive to underwater image makers for a variety of reasons. It is a 45MP full frame mirrorless camera that shoots full width 8K video, utilizes Canon's new RF lens mount, and also has next generation Dual Pixel autofocus.

housings.name: NA-E2F Cinema Housing for Z CAM E2-S6/F6/F8/M4 Cinema Camera
housings.description: The Z Cam flagship series of cameras continues to impress the cinema world with up to 8K resolution, 12-Bit ProRes RAW, and an incredibly affordable price. The compact and modular nature of the Z Cam lineup combined with the Nauticam housing has resulted in one of the smallest and most travel friendly cinema cameras currently on the market.

housings.name: NA-Z50 Housing for Nikon Z 50 Camera
housings.description: The Z 50 is Nikon's first DX (APS-C) sensor mirrorless camera to feature the new Z Lens Mount shared with the Z 6 and Z 7 full-frame cameras. The Z 50's 20.9MP CMOS sensor delivers exceptional image quality for both stills and video, leveraging the large APS-C sensor size with a powerful EXPEED 6 processor. UHD 4K video can be captured using the full width of the sensor at up to 30p and HD at 120p.

housings.name: NA-α2020 Housing for Sony A9II/A7RIV Camera (with HDMI 2.0 support)
housings.description: Sony has been at the forefront of the mirrorless evolution, offering cameras with specifications that are truly geared towards meeting the disparate needs of today's image makers while maintaining a similar, if not almost identical form factor. With the a7R IV, Sony introduced the highest resolution full frame mirrorless camera to date and with the a9 II it took speed image quality to another level. Luckily, for those wishing to take their cameras underwater, the a7R IV and the a9 II have extremely similar body size and control placement. For this reason, Nauticam is offering the NA-α2020 housing that offer full support for both cameras in the same housing without modification.

housings.name: NA-RX100VII Housing for Sony DSC-RX100 VII Digital Camera
housings.description: Sony's CyberShot DSC RX line has long been a favorite of the underwater shooter, packing great image and video quality into a feature-rich compact camera. The seventh iteration of this line, the RX100 VII continues to improve the 1"sensor with faster shooting performance and more precise focusing made possible by the redesigned CMOS sensor and improved BIONZ X image processor.

housings.name: NA-G7XIII Housing for Canon PowerShot G7X Mark III Camera
housings.description: Offering multimedia fluency within a compact design, the Canon PowerShot G7X Mark III is a sleek camera distinguished by its advanced sensor design and flexible imaging capabilities. Its 20.1MP 1" CMOS sensor uses a stacked design, which pairs with the DIGIC 8 image processor to realize especially fast focusing performance, full-resolution shooting at up to 20 fps, and UHD 4K30p video recording. Optically, the G7X Mark III houses a 4.2x zoom lens, which covers a 24-100mm equivalent focal length range for wide-angle to short-telephoto fields of view. An f/1.8-2.8 maximum aperture range suits working in difficult lighting conditions as does an Optical Image Stabilizer, which compensates for the effects of camera shake. The camera's slim design also incorporates a 3.0" 180° tilting touchscreen LCD and has both Bluetooth and Wi-Fi for wirelessly connecting to a mobile device.

housings.name: Atomos Ninja V Housing for Atomos Ninja V, Ninja V+ and Ninja Ultra 5" Recorder/Monitor/Player (HDMI 2.0 cable Sold Separately)
housings.description: * Compatible with the Atomos Ninja V, V+, 5.2, Ultra
housings.cameraName: Ninja V, Ninja V+ and Ninja Ultra 5" Recorder/Monitor/Player (HDMI 2.0 cable Sold Separately)

housings.name: NA-GH5SV Housing for Panasonic Lumix GH5/GH5S/GH5II Cameras with HDMI 2.0 Support
housings.description: Panasonic hybrid camera systems have revolutionized all levels of motion imaging capture. Pairing high quality interchangeable lenses with compact camera bodies, the video camera of choice for underwater filmmakers has undergone an incredible transformation in recent years. It has become the Panasonic GH5, GH5S and GH5 II. An exceptional hybrid housing to complement an exceptional hybrid camera, the NA-GH5SV is a video-centric version of the NA-GH5 housing that supports HDMI 2.0 output via the new M28 bulkhead.
housings.housingMount: N85 for Olympus and Panasonic Micro Four Thirds
housings.cameraName: Lumix GH5/GH5S/GH5II Cameras with HDMI 2.0 Support

housings.name: NA-RX100V Pro Package Housing for RX100V including Flexitray, Right Handle, Ball Mounts, and Shutter Release Extension
housings.description: With the RX100 V Sony has continued to add features to this workhorse compact camera and Nauticam is keeping pace with the new NA-RX100V. The NA-RX100V housing provides the ergonomics, build quality, and innovative feature set our customers demand in a tiny, travel friendly package. Nauticam designs are always improving, and new features integrated into each new release. The ergonomic experience has been tailored for a photographer's right hand on the side of the housing, placing key controls literally at the users finger tips.

housings.name: Digital Cinema System for ARRI ALEXA Mini Camera ~Includes N200 250mm Optical-Glass Wide-Angle Dome Port, N200 Extension Rings 30, 40 and 50, and Lens Control Drive Shafts
housings.description: ARRI ALEXA is the undisputed king of the feature film and commercial production video worlds, and the latest form factor iteration brings the amazing Alexa image quality into a super-lightweight carbon fiber body that is less than half the length of an Alexa XT, and weighs only 2.3 kg / 5 lbs.

housings.name: Weapon LT Housing for RED DSMC2 Camera System (N120 Port)
housings.description: The RED Weapon series of DSMC2 cinema cameras brings the option for capturing up to full-frame 8K resolution RAW underwater video. A camera this capable deserves a housing equally powerful and customizable. The Nauticam Weapon LT housing supports a wide variety of options to take full advantage of the latest RED cinema cameras in the lightest and easiest to operate underwater housing for cinema cameras available today. This housing also supports the full line of RED DSMC2 BRAINS including the Epic-W 8K, Scarlet-W 5K, and Red Raven 4.5K.

housings.name: NA-RT7 Housing for REDTOUCH 7 LCD Monitor, DSMC2 Pogo Monitor Connection
housings.description: The NA-RT7 housing supports the RED REDTOUCH 7 LCD Monitor. The housing ships with LEMO to Pogo adapters that attach to the monitor and the camera body respectively. The housing comes with a vacuum system pre-installed.

housings.name: NA-IP6 housing (Yellow) for iPhone6
housings.description: -Compatible to iPhone6 -Superior ergonomic design and free camera app -Customized shutter-release button design allows the core camera function to be accessed at the users fingertips -32mm threaded glass lens port -Secure and easy to use locking latch -Photo and video modes usable with App -Integrated universal tripod mount

housings.name: NA-IP6 housing (Blue) for iPhone6
housings.description: -Compatible to iPhone6 -Superior ergonomic design and free camera app -Customized shutter-release button design allows the core camera function to be accessed at the users fingertips -32mm threaded glass lens port -Secure and easy to use locking latch -Photo and video modes usable with App -Integrated universal tripod mount

housings.name: NA-H4D housing for Hasselblad H4D /H3D system
housings.description: Nauticam sets new standards for underwater image quality by introducing our NA-H4D housing for Hasselblad H4D/H3D systems.

housings.name: NA-RX100IIV housing for Sony Cyber-shot DSC-RX100 II Digital Camera (HDMI bulkhead included)
housings.cameraName: Cyber-shot DSC-RX100 II Digital Camera (HDMI bulkhead included)

housings.name: NA-XT1 housing for Fujifilm X-T1 Camera
housings.description: Nauticam is pleased to announce the NA-XT1 housing for the Fujifilm X-T1 Mirrorless camera. Nauticam's experience in the world of underwater housings and accessories for mirrorless cameras is unrivaled, and the company is pleased to add the flagship mirrorless camera from Fuji to its lineup.

housings.name: NA-A7 Housing for Sony A7/A7R Cameras
housings.description: The Sony A7 brings the convenience and advanced technology of an electronic viewfinder to the full-frame camera market. The XGA OLED viewfinder lets users see the results of their exposure settings in-camera. While it can't show what effect strobes would have on the exposure, for those shooting natural light or hybrid stills/video with LED lights this finally gives those shooters access to shooting through a viewfinder on a full-frame camera. For the still shooter this gives a small housing for a small camera, each with huge features.

housings.name: NA-5DSR Housing for Canon EOS 5DS/5DSR/5DMKIII Cameras
housings.description: The Canon 5DS and 5DS R raised the resolution bar to a new high for the digital SLR with a 50.2MP sensor. Taking advantage of this high level of resolution underwater requires an equally impressive housing. The NA-5DSR not only works with the 5DS and 5DS R, it also works with the 5DMKIII.

housings.name: NA-D5 Housing for Nikon D5 Camera
housings.description: Pro body performance is difficult to quantify on paper, but immediately evident when holding the camera in hand. Metal construction inspires confidence. The 12 fps continuous shooting speed (with AF) and a 200 shot RAW buffer keeps up with the fastest action. A large, bright viewfinder offers a clear view of the shooting scene, and Multi-CAM 20K tracks focus with incredible accuracy. The D5 is capable of 3,780 shots per charge (according to the CIPA rating). While the Nikon D4 was already a Professional Performance Powerhouse, the D5 is even better.

housings.name: NA-D4s Housing for Nikon D4/D4s Camera
housings.description: The NA-D4 is a powerhouse of ingenuity combining everything Nauticam users have come to appreciate from the brand along with several progressive new features that recently debuted on the NA D800. The industry leading engineering of the existing Nauticam housings is obvious with the easy and secure latching system, unrivalled port locking lever system and the exceptional interchangeable viewfinders. The award winning ergonomics of these previous housings have been retained while adding notable refinements wherever appropriate.

housings.name: NA-D600 Housing for Nikon D600 Camera
housings.description: The D600 represents a new breed of DSLR with a full-frame sensor in a package with a cropped-sensor price tag. Although reasonably priced it doesn't skimp on impressive stats. The innovative NA-D600 gets this next level camera underwater with features that will please both still and video shooters alike.

ports.name: N200 250mm Optical-Glass Wide-Angle Dome Port ~Deep Version - Depth Rated to 100m
ports.description: Nauticam optical-glass dome ports are finely ground to the highest standard of precision and represent the state of the art in both manufacturing and optical technology. Different size ports are available to support a wide variety of lenses and housing types. Port extensions or adapters may be necessary for some ports and housings. This optical-glass wide-angle port has a diameter of 250mm and is part of the N120 port system.

ports.name: N85 Macro Port 120
ports.description: The N85 Macro Port 120 is designed to work with the OM Systems M.Zuiko ED 90mm F3.5 Macro IS PRO lens and is capable of operating the lens' focus distance switch underwater. This switch allows for setting the focus distance and thereby the maximum magnification of the lens with three options: 'super macro', '0.25 - 0.5m', and '0.5m to infinity'. A window on the port allows for easily visually confirming the switches location. The performance of Nauticam Wet Lenses depends on which mode the lens is in so please consult the port chart for a detailed listing. PDF User Manual
